Roadmap

Appearance

TraciumExecution Intelligence Infrastructure

Turn program execution into a queryable, replayable data model.

What is Tracium?
Getting Started
GitHub

Execution as Data

Every variable, every stack frame, every heap object — captured and persisted as structured, queryable data that outlives the session.

Real JDI Capture

Not a simulator. Tracium attaches a real Java debugger (JDI) and records actual execution state at every step.

Persistent Traces

Traces are stored as durable artifacts. Replay a bug from last week. Compare execution across code versions. Query historical traces.

UEF Contract

Universal Execution Format — a language-agnostic, versioned schema that any tool can consume. The shared language of execution.

Multi-Consumer

One trace, many consumers. Visualization (Prism), IDE (Pulse), SDK (Vector), AI, CI/CD — all read the same data.

Production Ready

Sandbox mode for learning. Attach mode for production debugging. Configurable fidelity from full capture to minimal overhead.

Execution Intelligence Infrastructure

Tracium
